_comment: DEX / orderbook / matching-engine chain. ZK validity (no challenge window — finalization IS the proof, sub-batch latency); NeoFS off-chain DA (cheap, retrievable, Neo-native); delayed exit gives the operator a window to drain orderbook on shutdown without users front-running; gatewayEnabled=true so traders can move funds across Elastic Network L2s without L1 round-trips. permissionlessExit=false matches the operator-assisted shutdown story; users escape via the §15.5 escape hatch if the operator stalls. See samples/README.md.
